examples: During that time I was diagnosed with anticipatory anxiety disorder.
During this time I was diagnosed with anticipatory anxiety disorder.
Anticipatory anxiety is often worse than the actual experience you'll face.
Chairman Alan Greenspan and the chairman-to-be, Ben S. Bernanke, said they were fighting an anticipatory battle against deflation.
In responding to the crisis, lessons learnt and anticipatory approaches should be included in the analysis.
